description: An image — a queryable record of one blob's metadata. The blob bytes live in R2 (the blobs service); this record carries everything the website needs to render the image without fetching it. The record's rkey is the blob CID. Bodies reference an image as ![](blob://<cid>).

cid.description: The blob's content identifier — also this record's rkey.

dominantColor.description: Dominant color as a hex string, e.g. #3a2f1c.
